reason: REJECT — 3 gaps found. (1) MEDIUM: plan G4e explicitly requires 'FR list' in RELEASE_NOTES.md, but no FR-01..FR-08 enumeration is present (FR list lives only in QUALITY_REPORT.md as a cross-reference, not in the release notes themselves). (2) LOW: version tag date 'gate4-20260607-score97' on L4 is one day off from HANDOVER.md P6-gate4-20260608 checkpoint — should be 'gate4-20260608-score97'. (3) LOW: Features section L15 captures commit subject but does not explicitly name RISK_ASSESSMENT.md and RISK_REGISTER.md, the two artifacts actually created by commit 2c43a42. Checks (a) composite score 97.1288 matches quality_manifest.json gate_results.gate4.score, (b) all 3 P6 fix commits (6be9ede da_waiver, 098ca3e SAD↔SPEC parity, e0eeb86 harness __file__ path fix) accurately captured, (d) Known Issues correctly cross-references QUALITY_REPORT.md and RISK_REGISTER.md, and (f) no fabricated commits — all sections trace to real git log entries — all PASS. Recommend Agent A round to add FR list, correct version date, and name risk artifacts explicitly.

gaps.message: Plan G4e (phase6_plan.md L194-196) explicitly requires 'FR list' as a RELEASE_NOTES.md element, but the file does not enumerate the 8 FRs (FR-01..FR-08). Add an '## Functional Requirements' section listing each FR-01..FR-08 with brief status from QUALITY_REPORT.md per-FR scores.
Version tag on L4 is 'gate4-20260607-score97' but HANDOVER.md P6-gate4-20260608 checkpoint is 2026-06-08. Should be 'gate4-20260608-score97' for date alignment.

Features section L15 captures commit subject 'feat(p7): add Phase 7 risk artifacts' but does not explicitly name RISK_ASSESSMENT.md and RISK_REGISTER.md — the two artifacts actually created by commit 2c43a42. Suggest adding '...risk artifacts (RISK_ASSESSMENT.md, RISK_REGISTER.md)' for explicitness.
